name: nf-core-module-dev
description: Agents and skills for creating, testing, and documenting Nextflow nf-core modules

interface.shortDescription: Create, test, and document nf-core Nextflow modules
interface.longDescription: Three specialist agents (nf-module-dev, nf-test-expert, nf-secretary) that cover every file in an nf-core module: main.nf, environment.yml, nf-tests, snapshots, and meta.yml. Orchestrated end-to-end by the nf-module-manager skill.
defaultPrompt: Use the nf-module-manager skill to build or update nf-core modules end-to-end.
